name: Tumbler Black Metal - Threshold™: Bathroom Accessory, Traditional Style, 12oz Capacity, Easy to Clean
description:
The Black Metal Tumbler from Threshold™ makes a functional and stylish addition to your bathroom. Made of steel and featuring a clean black finish and a tall 4.72-inch height, it blends easily with your existing decor while providing an attractive, industrial accent piece. The tumbler provides you with plenty of space for storing your bathroom essentials, making it easy to keep the countertop clean, organized and clutter-free, and it can be spot-cleaned or wiped down for easy upkeep.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
